side_effects.description: Local area reaction at injection site
Severe reaction with flushing, sweating, tachycardia, lightheadedness, vision loss, hypotension (75/35)
Lightheadedness and nearly fainting with vision loss

protocol_notes: Reaction occurred on 10th injection after 6-7 initial injections without issues. Reactions progressively worsened with 8th injection showing local reaction, 9th showing local and systemic symptoms, and 10th being severe. Required Benadryl and emergency monitoring. User reports extensive prior peptide experience without reactions. Suspected either peptide degradation or developing Type I hypersensitivity/IgE antibodies.
